# Asteraid

> Professional web platform for Asterisk PBX administration. Manage multiple Asterisk servers from a single web interface.

Asteraid is a free, self-hosted web platform built by Freeng Ltd for IT engineers who manage Asterisk-based telephony infrastructure. It replaces scattered SSH sessions and manual config editing with a unified, browser-based control center.

## What Asteraid does

- **Multi-PBX Management** — Add any number of Asterisk servers (by hostname or IP) and manage them centrally. Connect via SSH (password or key).
- **Real-time Monitoring** — Live dashboard via WebSocket: RAM usage, trunk status (online/offline/disabled), extension status, active channels, last reload time, performance charts.
- **Visual Dialplan Editor** — No-code/low-code drag-and-drop block diagram editor (powered by ReactFlow) that generates real Asterisk dialplan automatically.
- **CDR (Call Detail Records)** — Full call history via ODBC. Filter by type (inbound/outbound/missed), search by number, built-in audio player, export to CSV/XLSX.
- **SSH Web Terminal** — Full-featured xterm.js terminal in the browser. No PuTTY needed.
- **Active Directory Integration** — Connect to multiple AD controllers, map groups to roles, import users.
- **Role-based Access Control (RBAC)** — 4 roles: Administrator, Supervisor, User, Security. Each role has its own dashboard.
- **Backup & Disaster Recovery** — AES-encrypted backups. Entire PBX network config in one archive. Restore from backup + decryption key only.
- **Version History** — Automatic configuration snapshot on every "Apply". Browse and restore any previous state.
- **Firewall Management** — Built-in firewall rules at PBX level with ipset support.
- **SSL Certificate Management** — Upload, assign and monitor TLS certificates.
- **Audit Log** — Every change logged with actor, timestamp, and before/after diff view.
- **Config File Editor** — Monaco-based editor (VS Code engine) for direct Asterisk .conf file editing.

## Pricing

- **Single-server deployment: Free forever.** No licenses, no hidden fees.
- Multi-server management is a paid feature.

## Technology

- **Backend:** Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Socket.IO, SSH2, Asterisk AMI, LDAP, Ansible, JWT
- **Frontend:** React 17, TypeScript, Redux, ReactFlow, Monaco Editor, xterm.js, Chart.js
- **Deployment:** Docker containers (2 containers: Configuration Server + MongoDB)

## System Requirements

- CPU: 1 core (x86_64)
- RAM: 2 GB minimum
- Storage: 16 GB minimum
- OS: Any Linux with Docker (Ubuntu, Debian, CentOS, or cloud)
- Network: 1Gb Ethernet (bridge mode for VMs)

## Company

Developed and maintained by **Freeng Ltd**.

## Links

- Website: https://asteraid.com
- Documentation: https://asteraid.com (see Documentation link in footer)
